name: Urban Car Drift Game
description: Welcome to the world of Urban Car Drift Game. Get ready to ignite your engines, push the pedal to the metal, and drift like a pro in the most thrilling Urban Rush Car Game ever. This is not just a driving simulator game, its an adrenaline-pumping, tire-squealing, smoke-flying experience that takes your car control skills to the next level. Whether you are into precision driving, freestyle drifting, or open world cruising, this game has something for every car enthusiast.
instructions: W Arrow Up rarr Move Front S Arrow Down rarr Move Back A Arrow Left rarr Move Left D Arrow Right rarr Move Right - To click any button use mouse
